svg.aria-label: 43 skills across 5 domains making the hard calls every AI PM faces.
svg.title: Judgment Layer
svg.desc: The middle layer: Product Sense, AI Strategy, Safety and Trust, Agent Design, and Eval and Quality — each domain a specialist team that the orchestrator deploys based on the structural shape of the problem.
svg.text: 43 skills · 5 domains · The calls that separate a PM who's been in the room from one who's read about the room
Every skill includes a WHEN WRONG section — the conditions under which the advice fails

g.text: When should AI act, not answer?
Can't measure it? Don't ship it
All 43 skills import from Layer 1 (Thinking) before executing · No circular dependencies across plugins · Each is independently installable
